sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112822" key="fwli/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φωλ-ίον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φωλεός,</foreign> <sense id="n112822.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fox's hole,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:18:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.18.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
